name: ng-toggle-group
title: Toggle Group (Angular)
description: Mutually exclusive or multi-select cluster of Toggle items, built on Spartan-ng brain ToggleGroup. Use for inline option pickers (text alignment, view mode, filter chips). Mirrors React ToggleGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-toggle-group.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
